Name: python-naming
Convention: snake_case for functions/variables; PascalCase for classes; UPPER_SNAKE for constants; _ prefix for private
Example: def process_data()  class DataProcessor  MAX_RETRIES = 3  def _internal_helper()
Keywords: python naming snake case pascal upper private convention

Name: javascript-naming
Convention: camelCase for functions/variables; PascalCase for classes/components; UPPER_SNAKE for constants
Example: function processData()  class DataProcessor  const MAX_RETRIES = 3
Keywords: javascript naming camel case pascal component convention

Name: css-naming
Convention: kebab-case for classes/IDs; BEM-like naming for component hierarchy: .block-element
Keywords: css naming kebab case bem block element modifier class

Name: typescript-types
Convention: interface > type for object shapes; Zod schema for runtime validation; avoid any/unknown without assertion
Example: interface User { id: string; name: string; }\nconst UserSchema = z.object({ id: z.string(), name: z.string() });
Keywords: typescript types interface zod schema validation convention

Name: react-naming
Convention: PascalCase file names for components; use prefix for hooks; Props suffix for prop types
Keywords: react naming component hook props file convention

Name: file-structure
Convention: Organize: utility functions first → classes in logical order → main entry point. Separate concerns into modules
Example:
# utils.py (helpers)
# models.py (data classes)
# routes.py (API endpoints)
# app.py (main entry + config)
Keywords: file structure organize utility class main entry module

Name: code-sections
Convention: Use section dividers for major code blocks in large files
Keywords: code section divider separator comment organize large file

Name: docstring-required
Convention: Classes and public methods require docstrings; inline comments for non-obvious logic only
Keywords: docstring class method comment documentation python

Name: api-response-format
Convention: Always return JSON with error key for failures; use standard HTTP status codes
Keywords: api response json error format status code convention

Name: error-handling-template
Convention: Standard try/except pattern for Flask routes
Keywords: error handling try except flask jsonify pattern template

Name: config-file-convention
Convention: Sensitive data in gitignored JSON; runtime settings separate from secrets
Example: config.json (gitignored): API keys, private keys\nsettings.json (tracked): UI preferences, defaults\n.env (gitignored): environment-specific vars
Keywords: config file sensitive gitignore settings secret separate

Name: env-var-naming
Convention: Environment variables: PROJECT_SETTING_NAME format; document in README
Keywords: environment variable naming convention project prefix

Name: import-order
Convention: Standard library → third-party → project internal; blank line between groups
Example:
import os
import sys

import flask
import yt_dlp

from .utils import helper
from .models import Video
Keywords: import order standard third party internal sort group

Name: git-commit-message
Convention: Conventional commits: type(scope): description. Types: feat/fix/chore/docs/refactor/test
Example: feat(search): add language filter for search results\nfix(download): handle 429 rate limit gracefully\nchore: bump version to 1.2.3
Keywords: git commit message conventional type scope description

Name: table-format-note
Convention: Tables for note.com: remove outer pipes; keep only inner separators
Keywords: table format note.com markdown pipes outer inner separator
